title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on making OpsPal more reliable and easier to use. The platform now automatically detects and prevents field conflicts when Salesforce Dynamic Forms are active, and resolves startup issues that were causing false error messages. These improvements mean fewer interruptions and smoother workflows for your revenue operations.

entries.headline: Prevents field conflicts and profile errors in Salesforce
details: OpsPal now detects when Salesforce Dynamic Forms are active and prevents invisible field additions that could break your forms
Automatically assigns new record types to System Administrator profiles to prevent permission errors
Converts blocking routing errors to warnings so your sessions continue running smoothly

entries.headline: Eliminates false missing package errors at startup
